显示 HN：TTF-DOOM – 在 TrueType 字体提示内运行的光线投射器

Show HN: TTF-DOOM – A raycaster running inside TrueType font hinting

github.com 作者 4RH1T3CT0R 分数 51 评论 12 2026/04/07 03:25
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. 一个 DOOM 风格的光线投射器，在 TrueType 字体的提示程序中运行。
  2. 这是什么？ TrueType 字体有一个内置的虚拟机，用于网格拟合字形。它有一个堆栈、存储槽、算术、条件、函数调用——事实证明它是图灵完备的。我想看看是否可以让它渲染 3D 图形。字体文件包含以 TrueType 字节码编写的 DDA 光线投射引擎。字形“A”有 16 个垂直条形轮廓，提示程序针对 16x16 图块地图进行光线投射，并使用 SCFS 指令重新定位这些条形以形成 3D 透视图。整个内容为 6.5 KB。 JS 处理移动、敌人和射击，然后通过 font-variation-settings 将坐标传递给字体。该字体进行光线投射和墙壁渲染。画布覆盖将敌人、武器和 HUD 绘制在顶部。它是如何工作的 我编写了一个小型编译器，它采用自定义 DSL 并输出 TrueType 提示程序集。 DSL 看起来像一个精简的 C: func raycast(col: int) -> int: var ra: int = player_angle + col * 3 - FOV_HALF var dx: int = get_cos(ra) var dy: int = get_sin(ra) ...
  3. 它编译为 TT 字节码 - FDEF、CALL、RS、WS、SCFS 等 - 并与 sin/cos 查找表和地图数据一起注入到 .ttf 文件中。编译器处理变量分配（所有内容都进入 TT 存储槽）、函数定义（FDEF/ENDF）以及其他一些事情，例如定点数学。管道：doom.doom -> 词法分析器 -> 解析器 -> codegen -> doom.ttf
  4. TrueType 算术是疯狂的 MUL 计算 (a*b)/64。不是 a*b。内部一切都是 F26Dot6 定点。所以 1 * 4 = 0。我大概花了两天时间才找到解决方法：DIV(a, 1) 返回 a * 64 （DIV 同样损坏），然后 MUL(a*64, b) = (a*64*b)/64 = a*b。也没有 WHILE 指令。循环编译为递归 FDEF，FreeType 将调用堆栈限制在约 64 帧。 16 列 x 14 射线台阶几乎不适合。 return 在递归中 - while 不退出。它推动价值并持续发展。一切都必须用命中标志重写。 SCFS 采用 F26Dot6 像素坐标，而不是字体单位 - 我花了一段时间才弄清楚为什么每个条都是一个小斑点。 Chrome 会缓存提示字形，有时会在轴更改时跳过重新提示 - 通过每帧抖动进行修复。 SVTCA[0] 选择 Y，[1] 选择 X。 建筑 字体仅渲染墙壁。 JS 完成其他所有事情。玩家位置和角度进入三个字体变化轴（MOVX、MOVY、TURN）。 JS 将坐标填充到每一帧的 font-variation-settings 中。浏览器重新提示字形。形状变化。在演示中按 Tab 键查看幕后发生了什么：
  5. 尝试一下 git clone https://github.com/4RH1T3CT0R7/ttf-doom.git cd ttf-doom pip install fonttools freetype-py pygame pytest python game/build.py python -m http.server 8765

Original Summary

  1. A DOOM-style raycaster that runs inside a TrueType font's hinting program.
  2. What is this? TrueType fonts have a built-in virtual machine for grid-fitting glyphs. It's got a stack, storage slots, arithmetic, conditionals, function calls - and it turns out it's Turing-complete. I wanted to see if I could get it to render 3D graphics. The font file contains a DDA raycasting engine written in TrueType bytecode. The glyph "A" has 16 vertical bar contours, and the hinting program raycasts against a 16x16 tile map and repositions those bars using SCFS instructions to form a 3D perspective view. The whole thing is 6.5 KB. JS handles movement, enemies, and shooting, then passes coordinates to the font through font-variation-settings. The font does the raycasting and wall rendering. Canvas overlay draws enemies, weapon, and HUD on top. How it works I wrote a small compiler that takes a custom DSL and outputs TrueType hinting assembly. The DSL looks like a stripped-down C: func raycast(col: int) -> int: var ra: int = player_angle + col * 3 - FOV_HALF var dx: int = get_cos(ra) var dy: int = get_sin(ra) ...
  3. This compiles to TT bytecode - FDEF, CALL, RS, WS, SCFS, etc. - and gets injected into a .ttf file along with sin/cos lookup tables and the map data. The compiler handles variable allocation (everything goes into TT storage slots), function definitions (FDEF/ENDF), and a few other things like fixed-point math. The pipeline: doom.doom -> lexer -> parser -> codegen -> doom.ttf
  4. TrueType arithmetic is insane MUL does (a*b)/64. Not a*b. Everything is F26Dot6 fixed-point internally. So 1 * 4 = 0. I lost probably two days to this before I found a workaround: DIV(a, 1) returns a * 64 (DIV is equally broken), then MUL(a*64, b) = (a*64*b)/64 = a*b. There's no WHILE instruction either. Loops compile to recursive FDEFs, and FreeType caps the call stack at ~64 frames. 16 columns x 14 ray steps barely fits. return inside a recursive-while doesn't exit. It pushes a value and keeps going. Everything had to be rewritten with hit flags. SCFS takes F26Dot6 pixel coordinates, not font units - took me a while to figure out why every bar was a tiny speck. Chrome caches hinted glyphs and sometimes skips re-hinting when axes change - fixed with per-frame jitter. SVTCA[0] selects Y, [1] selects X. Architecture The font just renders walls. JS does everything else. Player position and angle go into three font variation axes (MOVX, MOVY, TURN). JS stuffs coordinates into font-variation-settings every frame. Browser re-hints the glyph. Shape changes. Press Tab in the demo to see what's going on under the hood:
  5. Try it git clone https://github.com/4RH1T3CT0R7/ttf-doom.git cd ttf-doom pip install fonttools freetype-py pygame pytest python game/build.py python -m http.server 8765

评论（默认中文）

tadfisher 2026/04/07 07:11
你（或者我怀疑你的法学硕士）关于 Doom 使用光线投射引擎的说法不正确。是的，《德军总部》符合这个描述。 Doom 相当著名地为关卡数据引入了 BSP，它从前到后绘制排序的多边形，而无需光线行进。
You are (or I suspect your LLM is) not correct about Doom using a raycasting engine. Wolfenstein fits that description, yes. Doom rather famously introduced BSP for level data and it draws sorted polygons front-to-back without ray-marching.
在 HN 中查看
4RH1T3CT0R 2026/04/07 12:14
从技术上讲是的，大多数受限平台端口（据我记得）都会做同样的事情（DOOMQL、TI-84 版本、Excel 版本），因为 BSP 很难适应有限的虚拟机。这里的“DOOM风格”更多的是关于类型而不是渲染技术
technically yes, most constrained-platform ports (as I remember) do the same though (DOOMQL, the TI-84 version, the Excel one) since BSP is hard to fit into a limited VM. "DOOM-style" here is more about the genre than the rendering technique
在 HN 中查看
bananaboy 2026/04/07 12:34
那么它并不是真正的“DOOM 风格的光线投射器”，而是德军总部 3D 风格的光线投射器。

不过很酷！

It's not really a "DOOM-style raycaster" then, it's a Wolfenstein 3D-style raycaster.

Pretty cool though!

在 HN 中查看
4RH1T3CT0R 2026/04/07 15:55
谢谢！
Thanks!
在 HN 中查看
kevin_thibedeau 2026/04/07 11:49
> TrueType MUL 是 (ab)/64，而不是 ab

这就是定点运算的工作原理。对于 Q26.6 数字的乘法，您可以通过除/移其中之一来清除平方缩放因子 (2^6)。

> TrueType MUL does (ab)/64, not ab

This is how fixed-point arithmetic works. For multiplication of Q26.6 numbers you clear the squared scaling factors (2^6) by dividing/shifting one of them away.

在 HN 中查看
tombert 2026/04/07 07:00
我尝试玩演示版，但对我来说只是绿色条。 墙壁没有放大或缩小，它只是一堆坚固的静态绿色条。

当我靠近时，敌人确实会放大和缩小，并且小地图起作用了。

在 Linux 上尝试使用 Brave，在 macOS 上尝试使用 Google Chrome。

I tried playing the demo, and it was just green bars for me. The walls didn't scale up or shrink, it was just a bunch of solid static green bars.

The enemies did scale up and shrink as I got closer, and the minimap worked.

Tried with Brave on Linux, and Google Chrome on macOS.

在 HN 中查看
4RH1T3CT0R 2026/04/07 12:06
这是一个 FreeType 问题 - 它在 Linux 上默认使用自动提示并且不运行 TT 字节码。不幸的是，CSS 方面没有修复。适用于 Windows/macOS，其中 DirectWrite/CoreText 运行字节码
This is a FreeType issue - it uses auto-hinter by default on Linux and doesn't run the TT bytecode. No fix from CSS side unfortunately. Works on Windows/macOS where DirectWrite/CoreText run the bytecode
在 HN 中查看
tombert 2026/04/07 12:09
它在 macOS 上也不起作用。
It didn't work on macOS either.
在 HN 中查看
wingi 2026/04/07 15:47
是的。抱歉 - 在 MacOS 上的 Chrome / Safari 中只有绿色竖条。
Yeah. Sorry - on MacOS in Chrome / Safari only green vertical bars.
在 HN 中查看
4RH1T3CT0R 2026/04/07 15:51
然后只有窗户:(
Then only windows :(
在 HN 中查看
emanuele-em 2026/04/07 05:12
好吧，MUL 解决方法让我明白了。 MUL 确实（b)/64 所以你必须先 DIV 才能得到64，那么 MUL 最终给出 a*b。递归 FDEF 是因为没有 WHILE 吗？全部为 6.5KB？您实际上能从中获得什么样的帧速率？
Ok the MUL workaround got me. MUL does (ab)/64 so you have to DIV first to get a64, then MUL finally gives you a*b. And recursive FDEFs because there's no WHILE? All in 6.5KB? What kind of frame rate do you actually get out of this?
在 HN 中查看
4RH1T3CT0R 2026/04/07 05:26
帧速率取决于浏览器 - Chrome 在我的机器上提供大约 30-60fps，但瓶颈实际上是 Chrome 决定是否重新运行提示（必须添加轴抖动来强制它）。 TT 字节码本身执行速度很快，每帧可能有几千条指令

  The recursive FDEF thing is the worst part honestly. Every while loop is a function that calls itself, and FreeType kills you at ~64 deep. So you're constantly juggling how many columns vs how many ray steps you can afford
Frame rate depends on the browser - Chrome gives around 30-60fps on my machine, but the bottleneck is actually Chrome deciding whether to re-run hinting at all (had to add axis jitter to force it). The TT bytecode itself executes fast, it's maybe a few thousand instructions per frame

  The recursive FDEF thing is the worst part honestly. Every while loop is a function that calls itself, and FreeType kills you at ~64 deep. So you're constantly juggling how many columns vs how many ray steps you can afford
在 HN 中查看
